caption: The video begins with a scene from an animated show featuring Homer Simpson and three police officers. The officers wear dark blue uniforms and matching caps with gold badges. Homer, wearing a white collared shirt and blue pants, stands behind vertical bars, looking distressed with his mouth open. He is positioned closely next to a police officer who is gripping the bars. The scene then cuts abruptly to a stylized digital map of the world at night. The landmasses are outlined in glowing blue light, while urban areas are represented by clusters of bright yellow and orange lights. Thin blue lines of connectivity stretch across the oceans, linking various regions of the globe. The camera perspective on the map remains static, showing the global network of light and connection against a dark blue background.
